response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially utilized the reference JSON for segment structuring and verified song titles. Corrected phonetic mismatches and gaps in song snippets through precise manual transcription.
2. JSON Usage: Fully optimized the provided song segment ranges to match the 14-song medley structure, manually translating Japanese sections and finalizing timing boundaries.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each snippet with high precision to avoid cascading delays, adhering strictly to vocal starts and applying truncation where needed to keep subtitles synchronized.

subtitles.original: But, yo, time's wasting
subtitles.english: But, yo, time's wasting

subtitles.original: Show me what you really wanna do
subtitles.english: Show me what you really wanna do

subtitles.original: Now it's my turn to show you how Orpheus can lead
subtitles.english: Now it's my turn to show you how Orpheus can lead

subtitles.original: Sometimes it feels like you'll play that guitar for me and only me
subtitles.english: Sometimes it feels like you'll play that guitar for me and only me

subtitles.original: Oh, so not so predictable, they can see what I can see

subtitles.english: Let's write a track!

subtitles.original: こんな世界
subtitles.english: A world like this...

subtitles.english: In this incomplete, empty world...

subtitles.original: ステップ重ねて
subtitles.english: ...taking steps over and over,

subtitles.original: 光を

subtitles.english: Lost inside this dark desire

subtitles.english: And when the world crashes down

subtitles.english: When the world keeps turning

subtitles.original: Ha! You got eyes and ears, but you don't look or listen!
subtitles.english: Ha! You got eyes and ears, but you don't look or listen!

subtitles.original: In other words, you're useless, every last one of you!
